description: Deterministic compact golden diagnostics for C1 contract reality — stable diagnostic codes, payload policy failures, durable ref validation failures, ledger validation failures, and non-retrievable hash preservation rejection.

C1R001.message: Run Authority completion manifest hash does not match the pinned prerequisite value; manifest may be stale or tampered

C1R002.message: Run Authority base SHA does not match the pinned prerequisite value; base revision may be stale or tampered

C1R003.message: Route migration disposition is missing; every route must declare its migration status

C1R004.message: Route marked as warn-only non-conformant; this disposition blocks C1 acceptance

C1R005.message: Dual mutating ownership detected; a workflow resource has two concurrent mutating owners

C1R006.message: Fixture replay mutability detected; a fixture used for replay testing has changed since capture

C1R007.message: Producer mapping is incomplete; not all required producers have manifest entries

C1R008.message: Migration coverage gap detected; some producers lack migration milestone entries

C1R009.message: Migration milestone missing; a required migration milestone has no recorded completion

C1R010.message: Hash without retained payload detected; a digest is present but the retrievable payload bytes are not preserved

digest_only_rejection.description: Digest-only preservation is rejected by all boundary contract validators. A hash without retained retrievable bytes does not preserve a result.

payload_policy_digest_only.scenario: Payload with digest but no store_id/locator/durable_ref
payload_policy_digest_only.expected_issue_inline: Digest-only payload preservation is rejected by wbc.inline.v1 policy
payload_policy_digest_only.expected_issue_retention: Digest-only payload preservation is rejected by wbc.retention.v1 policy

durable_ref_digest_only.scenario: DurableRef with only a digest (empty store_id/locator)
durable_ref_digest_only.expected_issue_store: DurableRef.store_id is empty; cannot locate the durable store
durable_ref_digest_only.expected_issue_locator: DurableRef.locator is empty; cannot retrieve the object from the store

typed_payload_digest_only.scenario: TypedPayload with only content_digest (no inline_data, no ref)
typed_payload_digest_only.note: Digest-only typed payloads are integrity evidence, not result preservation

secret_exclusion_diagnostics.description: Boundary contracts must never carry secrets in durable refs or payloads

durable_ref_secret.scenario: DurableRef metadata contains a forbidden key

payload_policy_secret.scenario: Payload contains a key matching secret patterns

inline_exceeds_threshold.expected_issue: Payload exceeds inline threshold (16384 bytes) but no durable_ref is present

legal_hold_ephemeral_conflict.description: Legal hold active with ephemeral retention
legal_hold_ephemeral_conflict.expected_issue: Legal hold is active but retention_mode is 'ephemeral'

retention_encryption_bypass.note: Policy flag encryption_required=true is the default and should be validated

ordering_validation.missing_predecessor: does not exist in earlier events

provenance_validation.lineage_no_parent: Provenance has causal_lineage but parent_attempt_id is None
provenance_validation.parent_lineage_mismatch: does not match last lineage entry
provenance_validation.parent_no_lineage: Provenance has parent_attempt_id but causal_lineage is empty

retrievability.empty_store_id: DurableRef.store_id is empty; cannot locate the durable store
retrievability.empty_locator: DurableRef.locator is empty; cannot retrieve the object from the store
retrievability.empty_digest: DurableRef.digest is empty; integrity verification is impossible without a digest
retrievability.invalid_digest: is not a valid sha256 hex digest

tenant_scope.tenant_scope_no_tenant_id: DurableRef.access_scope is 'tenant' but tenant_id is None
tenant_scope.workflow_scope_no_workflow_id: DurableRef.access_scope is 'workflow' but workflow_id is None

secret_exclusion.forbidden_key: DurableRef metadata key matches forbidden secret pattern

no_non_retrievable_hash_preservation.rule: Every payload that carries a digest MUST also carry retrievable store identity and locator OR inline data. A digest alone is integrity evidence, not result preservation.
enforcement_points: validate_payload_preservation enforces both inline and retention policies

diagnostic_code_stability.rule: All C1R diagnostic codes are stable and must not be renamed, repurposed, or removed without a migration plan.
